title: Kayak
body: ![](http://www.kayak.es/images/skins/a-kayak-big-orange.gif)Besides being a water rowing sport, it is a *website* that searches for airplane tickets, hotel rooms or car rentals among a multitude of providers. I have been using the [American version](http://www.kayak.com) for some time now, but now (although in beta phase and only with the flight search service) the [Spanish version](http://www.kayak.es "Kayak in Spanish") has been released. **I think it is one of the best travel metasearch engines**, we all know eDreams, LastMinute, Atrapalo, Viajar and similar ones, but they tend to be heavy *websites* and therefore somewhat slow, you can also do your search directly with flight providers such as Vueling, Clickair, Spanair, RyanAir, AirEuropa, Easyjet, Iberia, etc. which, ultimately, is what Kayak does, being able to restrict this search according to your interests, such as, in addition to dates, flexibility in days, schedules, price range, preferred airlines or airports, etc. Furthermore, it does it in a fast, easy and flexible way. In Spanish we also have [VuelosBaratos](http://www.vuelosbaratos.es) or [minube](http://www.minube.com/), the latter goes a bit further in creating a social network, in my opinion both are inspired by [kayak](http://www.kayak.com).
